content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "從車站到咖啡店再到聊天",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，請問從車站到咖啡店怎麼走？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn cóng chēzhàn dào kāfēi diàn zěnme zǒu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 cong2 che1 zhan4 dao4 ka1 fei1 dian4 zen3 me5 zou3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get from the station to the coffee shop?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 역에서 커피숍까지 어떻게 가나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你一直走，到路口左轉，咖啡店就在對面。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yìzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, kāfēi diàn jiù zài duìmiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 yi4 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4 kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, ka1 fei1 dian4 jiu4 zai4 dui4 mian4.",
          "translation_en": "Go straight, turn left at the intersection, and the coffee shop is right across the street.",
          "translation_ko": "계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 좌회전하시면, 커피숍이 바로 맞은편에 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝你。我想買一杯咖啡，多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yì bēi kāfēi, duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie5 ni3. Wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi4 bei1 ka1 fei1, duo1 shao5 qian2?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I'd like to buy a cup of coffee, how much is it?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 커피 한 잔 사고 싶은데, 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "一杯咖啡六十塊。你要內用還是外帶？",
          "pinyin": "Yì bēi kāfēi liùshí kuài. Nǐ yào nèiyòng háishì wàidài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi4 bei1 ka1 fei1 liu4 shi2 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 nei4 yong4 hai2 shi4 wai4 dai4?",
          "translation_en": "One cup of coffee is sixty dollars. Will you have it here or take it away?",
          "translation_ko": "커피 한 잔에 60위안입니다. 매장에서 드실 건가요, 테이크아웃하실 건가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "內用。我給你一百塊，請找我四十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Nèiyòng. Wǒ gěi nǐ yì bǎi kuài, qǐng zhǎo wǒ sìshí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Nei4 yong4. Wo3 gei3 ni3 yi4 bai3 kuai4, qing3 zhao3 wo3 si4 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "I'll have it here. I'll give you one hundred dollars, please give me forty dollars change.",
          "translation_ko": "매장에서 먹을게요. 100위안 드릴 테니, 40위안 거슬러 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，這是你的咖啡和找錢。你住附近嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zhè shì nǐ de kāfēi hé zhǎo qián. Nǐ zhù fùjìn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, zhe4 shi4 ni3 de5 ka1 fei1 he2 zhao3 qian2. Ni3 zhu4 fu4 jin4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, here's your coffee and change. Do you live nearby?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기 커피와 거스름돈입니다. 근처에 사시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對，我剛搬到這裡。我想認識新朋友，你有空聊天嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ gāng bān dào zhèlǐ. Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou, nǐ yǒu kòng liáotiān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 gang1 ban1 dao4 zhe4 li3. Wo3 xiang3 ren4 shi5 xin1 peng2 you5, ni3 you3 kong4 liao2 tian1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I just moved here. I'd like to make new friends, do you have time to chat?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 방금 이곳으로 이사 왔어요. 새로운 친구를 사귀고 싶은데, 시간 돼서 이야기 좀 할 수 있을까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，我現在不忙。我們可以聊一下。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǒ xiànzài bù máng. Wǒmen kěyǐ liáo yíxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, wo3 xian4 zai4 bu4 mang2. Wo3 men5 ke3 yi3 liao2 yi2 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, I'm not busy now. We can chat for a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 지금 바쁘지 않아요. 잠깐 이야기 나눠요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much change does the customer get?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 거스름돈을 얼마나 받나요?",
          "options_en": ["40 dollars", "60 dollars", "100 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["40위안", "60위안", "100위안"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking for directions and ordering a drink in a shop."
    },
    {
      "title": "走錯地方和修理",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "請問，這裡是修理手機的地方嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng wèn, zhèlǐ shì xiūlǐ shǒujī de dìfang ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 wen4, zhe4 li3 shi4 xiu1 li3 shou3 ji1 de5 di4 fang5 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, is this the place to repair phones?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 여기가 휴대폰 수리하는 곳인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不好意思，你走錯了。修理手機的地方在路口對面。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, nǐ zǒu cuò le. Xiūlǐ shǒujī de dìfang zài lùkǒu duìmiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, ni3 zou3 cuo4 le5. Xiu1 li3 shou3 ji1 de5 di4 fang5 zai4 lu4 kou3 dui4 mian4.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, you're in the wrong place. The phone repair shop is across the intersection.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 잘못 오셨어요. 휴대폰 수리하는 곳은 교차로 맞은편에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝。我走過去看看。我的手機壞了，需要修理。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Wǒ zǒu guòqù kànkan. Wǒ de shǒujī huài le, xūyào xiūlǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie5. Wo3 zou3 guo4 qu4 kan4 kan5. Wo3 de5 shou3 ji1 huai4 le5, xu1 yao4 xiu1 li3.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I'll go over and take a look. My phone is broken and needs repair.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 건너가서 볼게요. 제 휴대폰이 고장 나서 수리가 필요해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題。你要買東西嗎？我們這裡有便宜的充電線。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Nǐ yào mǎi dōngxi ma? Wǒmen zhèlǐ yǒu piányi de chōngdiàn xiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4 ti2. Ni3 yao4 mai3 dong1 xi5 ma5? Wo3 men5 zhe4 li3 you3 pian2 yi5 de5 chong1 dian4 xian4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. Do you want to buy something? We have cheap charging cables here.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 물건 사실 건가요? 여기 싼 충전 케이블이 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊，一條充電線多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, yì tiáo chōngdiàn xiàn duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, yi4 tiao2 chong1 dian4 xian4 duo1 shao5 qian2?",
          "translation_en": "Sure, how much is one charging cable?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 충전 케이블 하나에 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "一條一百塊。你要算便宜一點嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yì tiáo yì bǎi kuài. Nǐ yào suàn piányi yì diǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi4 tiao2 yi4 bai3 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 suan4 pian2 yi5 yi4 dian3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "One is one hundred dollars. Do you want it a bit cheaper?",
          "translation_ko": "하나에 100위안입니다. 좀 더 싸게 해 드릴까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "可以算八十塊嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ suàn bāshí kuài ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3 yi3 suan4 ba1 shi2 kuai4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Can you make it eighty dollars?",
          "translation_ko": "80위안으로 해 주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好吧，八十塊給你。謝謝！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo ba, bāshí kuài gěi nǐ. Xièxie!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 ba5, ba1 shi2 kuai4 gei3 ni3. Xie4 xie5!",
          "translation_en": "Alright, eighty dollars for you. Thank you!",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 80위안에 드릴게요. 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer buy?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 샀나요?",
          "options_en": ["A phone", "A charging cable", "A coffee"],
          "options_ko": ["휴대폰", "충전 케이블", "커피"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking for directions and bargaining for a price."
    },
    {
      "title": "問路、買東西和聊天",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "請問，便利商店怎麼走？我想買東西。",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng wèn, biànlì shāngdiàn zěnme zǒu? Wǒ xiǎng mǎi dōngxi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 wen4, bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 zen3 me5 zou3? Wo3 xiang3 mai3 dong1 xi5.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get to the convenience store? I want to buy something.",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 편의점은 어떻게 가나요? 물건을 사고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你一直走，到路口右轉，便利商店就在左邊。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yìzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, biànlì shāngdiàn jiù zài zuǒbiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 yi4 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4 kou3 you4 zhuan3, bian4 li4 shang1 dian4 jiu4 zai4 zuo3 bian1.",
          "translation_en": "Go straight, turn right at the intersection, and the convenience store is on the left.",
          "translation_ko": "계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 우회전하시면, 편의점이 왼쪽에 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝。我到了。請問，一個三明治多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Wǒ dào le. Qǐng wèn, yí ge sānmíngzhì duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie5. Wo3 dao4 le5. Qing3 wen4, yi2 ge5 san1 ming2 zhi4 duo1 shao5 qian2?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I've arrived. Excuse me, how much is a sandwich?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 도착했어요. 실례합니다, 샌드위치 하나는 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "一個三明治三十五塊。你要買嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yí ge sānmíngzhì sānshíwǔ kuài. Nǐ yào mǎi ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi2 ge5 san1 ming2 zhi4 san1 shi2 wu3 kuai4. Ni3 yao4 mai3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "One sandwich is thirty-five dollars. Do you want to buy it?",
          "translation_ko": "샌드위치 하나에 35위안입니다. 사시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，我買一個。我給你五十塊，請找我十五塊。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ mǎi yí ge. Wǒ gěi nǐ wǔshí kuài, qǐng zhǎo wǒ shíwǔ kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 mai3 yi2 ge5. Wo3 gei3 ni3 wu3 shi2 kuai4, qing3 zhao3 wo3 shi2 wu3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll buy one. I'll give you fifty dollars, please give me fifteen dollars change.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 하나 살게요. 50위안 드릴 테니, 15위안 거슬러 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，這是你的三明治和找錢。你住附近嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zhè shì nǐ de sānmíngzhì hé zhǎo qián. Nǐ zhù fùjìn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, zhe4 shi4 ni3 de5 san1 ming2 zhi4 he2 zhao3 qian2. Ni3 zhu4 fu4 jin4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, here's your sandwich and change. Do you live nearby?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기 샌드위치와 거스름돈입니다. 근처에 사시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對，我住附近。我想認識新朋友，你有空聊天嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ zhù fùjìn. Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou, nǐ yǒu kòng liáotiān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 zhu4 fu4 jin4. Wo3 xiang3 ren4 shi5 xin1 peng2 you5, ni3 you3 kong4 liao2 tian1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I live nearby. I'd like to make new friends, do you have time to chat?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 근처에 살아요. 새로운 친구를 사귀고 싶은데, 시간 돼서 이야기 좀 할 수 있을까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，我現在不忙。我們可以聊一下。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǒ xiànzài bù máng. Wǒmen kěyǐ liáo yíxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, wo3 xian4 zai4 bu4 mang2. Wo3 men5 ke3 yi3 liao2 yi2 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, I'm not busy now. We can chat for a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 지금 바쁘지 않아요. 잠깐 이야기 나눠요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much change does the customer get?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 거스름돈을 얼마나 받나요?",
          "options_en": ["15 dollars", "35 dollars", "50 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["15위안", "35위안", "50위안"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking for directions, buying a snack, and making small talk."
    }
  ]
}
